CreateDedicatedChannel.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](ET/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
CreateDedicatedChannel.name: Channel name
CreateDedicatedChannel.networks: Routing parameters, required only when "routeType" is "static-route"
CreateDedicatedChannel.bgpAsn: BGP ASN, valid range: 1–4294967295; Baidu Cloud ASN: 45085. Required only when "routeType" is "bgp"
CreateDedicatedChannel.bgpKey: BGP authentication key, required only when "routeType" is "bgp"
CreateDedicatedChannel.enableIpv6: Whether IPv6 is enabled: 1 for enabled, 0 for disabled. IPv6 is a whitelist feature
CreateDedicatedChannel.baiduIpv6Address: Cloud-side IPv6 interconnect address, required when enableIpv6=1
CreateDedicatedChannel.customerIpv6Address: IDC-side IPv6 interconnect address, required when enableIpv6=1
CreateDedicatedChannel.ipv6Networks: IPv6 routing parameters, required when enableIpv6=1 and "routeType" is "static-route"
CreateDedicatedChannel.tags: List of tag key-value pairs to be created
CreateDedicatedChannel.tags.tagKey: Tag key; may contain uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /.; length 1–65
CreateDedicatedChannel.tags.tagValue: Tag value; may contain uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /.; length 0–65
